rows.label: qev055502_MSG0001
rows.name:
What... is this? Something attacking
me? Danger... this is dangerous.
So dangerous... Someone...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ah, my head hurts... My head...
is going to split open...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0003
rows.name:
I know who you are... I need
you to help me, please![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0004
rows.name: You saved my life. I must thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Ah, there is still something inside
my head. What on earth is this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev055502_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell her it is the will of the Ovah
that exists within the Orphe.

rows.label: qev055502_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev055502_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell her she is just still confused
and try to calm her down.

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0006
rows.name:
Could this be a normal thing for the
Orphe? So this is the will of the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0007
rows.name:
I am fine. I have calmed
down. Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0008
rows.name:
I am of the race called the Orphe,
and you are of the race called humans.
I am beginning to understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0009
rows.name:
But why am I here? I wonder if this
is also the will of the Ovah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0010
rows.name:
It is strange... I do not
seem to have a name.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_JNK0110
rows.name: Ensure Safety

rows.label: qev055502_SEL0111
rows.name:
Suggest that you should return to NLA
first, and she can worry about that later.

rows.label: qev055502_JNK0120
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev055502_SEL0121
rows.name:
Tell her that her division source
said she seems to be a new species.

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0011
rows.name: Yes, let us do that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0012
rows.name:
I must hurry back to NLA... and
speak with my division source.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0013
rows.name:
My division source... I see,
so I divided from that seed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055502_MSG0014
rows.name:
There is a mountain of things I wish
to confirm with my division source.
In any case, let us return to NLA.[ST:wait ]
